stem: To save for a trip, Marco works two part-time jobs: P and Q. He earns $15 per hour at job P and $25 per hour at job Q. In one week, Marco earned a total of t dollars working at the two jobs. The graph 15x + 25y = t represents all combinations of hours x at job P and hours y at job Q that produce t dollars. The line passes through the point (20, 0). What is the value of t?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The point (20, 0) means Marco worked 20 hours at job P and 0 hours at job Q. His earnings are 15(20) + 25(0) = 300. Therefore t = $300.

Choices A, C, and D result from using the wrong hourly rate or arithmetic mistakes.
